artPrompt: A gaunt mutant heron with three spindly legs stands poised in the toxic reservoir shallows, a single extra limb tucked beneath sickly bioluminescent plumage, glaring out with cold judgment over rippling murky green water. Rusted pipes and crumbling concrete haze under a bruised stormy sky behind. Tall, elegant film-still framing of grotesque stillness at depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Three-Legged Heron
text:
Flying
When Three-Legged Heron enters the battlefield, you gain 2 life unless it just ate something it shouldn't have. (It did. It always does. You gain 1 life instead.)
flavorText: Standing in the shallows on a leg and a half, judging the whole town.
